title: Purpose
doc_html:
§3102.  Purpose

The commissioner shall administer and monitor a banking development district program under the provisions of this Chapter to encourage the establishment of branches of a financial institution in geographic areas where there is a demonstrated need for banking services.

Acts 2007, No. 255, §1.
doc_text:
§3102.  Purpose
The commissioner shall administer and monitor a banking development district program under the provisions of this Chapter to encourage the establishment of branches of a financial institution in geographic areas where there is a demonstrated need for banking services.
Acts 2007, No. 255, §1.
